scripts.sync-assets: mkdir -p public/site-assets/images public/site-assets/client-logos public/site-assets/brand-partnership-logos && cp -f site-assets/images/* public/site-assets/images/ && cp -f site-assets/client-logos/* public/site-assets/client-logos/ && cp -f site-assets/brand-partnership-logos/* public/site-assets/brand-partnership-logos/
